headline: Intel’s US$3.3b India Substrate Plant Redraws AI Supply Chain
summary: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) and 3DGS plan a new substrate manufacturing plant in India with a reported investment of US$3.3b. The facility is aimed at expanding advanced semiconductor packaging capacity and diversifying the global chip supply chain. For you as an investor, this move sits at the intersection of Intel's core chip business and the broader push to spread manufacturing...
